import sys
import threading

def main():
    import sys
    input = sys.stdin.read
    data = input().split()
    idx = 0

    N = int(data[idx])
    idx += 1
    Q = int(data[idx])
    idx += 1

    C = list(map(int, data[idx:idx+N]))
    idx += N

    # Each box will store a set of colors
    boxes = [set() for _ in range(N+1)]
    for i in range(N):
        boxes[i+1].add(C[i])

    for _ in range(Q):
        a = int(data[idx])
        idx += 1
        b = int(data[idx])
        idx += 1

        # Move all balls from a to b
        if a == b:
            print(len(boxes[b]))
            continue

        # Merge set a into set b
        boxes[b] |= boxes[a]
        boxes[a].clear()

        print(len(boxes[b]))

threading.Thread(target=main).start()
